question: The scatter plot shows ad spend and sales for top product lines. What can we conclude about campaign performance across all product lines?

options.A: The campaign is very effective for every product line, since each one shown responds well to more spend.
options.B: The campaign is ineffective overall because only a few points show improvement.
options.C: The campaign appears effective for these top product lines, but we cannot infer performance for all lines without seeing average or poor performers.
options.D: The campaign harms performance because higher spend always reduces sales in these points.

explanation: Showing only the best product lines hides those that may respond little to additional ad spend, so the chart encourages overgeneralization.
